name: Thermal Wildlife Survey Mission
description: You are a Wildlife Biologist preparing for a night-time waterfowl survey. Your drone is equipped with a FLIR Boson 640 thermal camera with a slow 9Hz refresh rate. To avoid motion blur, you must configure a custom survey mission that compensates for this sensor. Refer to the operational brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/wetland_survey_spec.txt for the required camera specifications and flight mechanics. Configure the mission with the specified manual camera settings and stop-and-shoot mechanics. Save the final mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/thermal_survey.plan. Do not launch the vehicle.
